_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: The autologously transplanted Nf1-/- SKPs gave rise to sciatic plexiform neurofibromas within two months post implantation 100% of the time, whereas the transplanted heterozygous (Nf1+/-) SKPs showed no signs of tumor growth
details: Nf1-/- SKPs generated plexiform neurofibromas 100% of the time within 2 months when implanted into sciatic nerves, while heterozygous SKPs showed no tumor growth
